label: Transparent Witches Butter motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a Witches Butter jelly fungus motif for later background removal, isolated full subject, no surrounding environment, no text.
Subject: a compact cluster of golden yellow Witches Butter jelly fungus (Tremella mesenterica), lobed gelatin texture, glossy folds, sitting on one small fragment of wet dark bark with a few clear rain droplets; the bark fragment is part of the motif substrate, not a landscape.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the fungus or bark; make the silhouette readable and suitable as a design-system motif asset.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light preserving golden yellow jelly highlights, bark brown ridges, and rain grey wet reflections; playful warning-system mood but naturalistic.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 or green anywhere in the subject. Keep the jelly fungus optically opaque enough that the green background does not show through it.
Constraints: no forest scene, no leaves, no moss, no second fungus species, no labels, no watermark, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Witches Butter", derived from the visible transparent Witches Butter jelly fungus motif: golden yellow gelatin lobes on wet bark with rain-grey reflections.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from golden yellow jelly folds, amber shadows, bark brown ridges, wet charcoal bark, rain grey highlights, and pale woodland mist neutrals. Use only these motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the same source.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide. Create a single polished source board, not separate pages.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board with large readable labels and clear UI examples; avoid dense tiny token tables.
Required visible sections: Morphous Witches Butter title, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; guidance for Geist or Inter paired with Noto Sans JP; playful warning-system tone without cartoon lettering.
UI coverage: shadcn/tweakcn-compatible buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, bar/line/donut charts, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, form validation, compact data table, texture swatches, radius 8px, spacing scale, border tokens, focus rings, shadow tokens.
Visual style: premium product UI system, precise grid, 8px card radius, crisp shadcn-style controls, tactile jelly highlights as accents, bark-fissure dividers, rain speckle texture used sparingly, approachable playful warning system.
Palette labels to show: Spore Glow, Amber Jelly, Bark Umber, Wet Bark, Rain Slate, Mist Film, Cream Spore, Charcoal Bark, Warning Gold.
Text: short readable UI labels only; use real section labels listed above; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no colors outside the motif palette, no generic purple or blue gradients, no forest photo background, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Witches Butter".

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode companion board for the same Morphous theme named "Morphous Witches Butter". It must feel like the visible light board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible Witches Butter jelly fungus motif and the visible light-mode design-system board as references. Preserve golden jelly accents, amber warning highlights, wet bark browns, charcoal bark surfaces, rain grey dividers, cream spore text, Japanese typography guidance, component coverage, spacing, and 8px radius.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board, 3840 x 2160 preferred, at least 2400px wide. Create one polished dark-mode source board.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution board with large readable labels and clear shadcn/tweakcn UI examples; avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Witches Butter, Dark Mode, Palette, Type, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows.
Typography: English and Japanese examples; Geist or Inter plus Noto Sans JP; compact product UI, playful warning-system tone without cartoon lettering.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette search, sidebar navigation, top nav, dashboard metric cards, charts, empty/loading/error/success/warning states, form validation, compact data table, texture swatches, radius 8px, spacing scale, border tokens, focus rings, shadow tokens.
Visual details: deep wet bark background, cream spore foreground, golden jelly primary actions, rain-slate borders, amber status chips, subtle bark-fissure and rain-speckle texture, crisp cards and controls.
Palette labels to show: Spore Glow, Amber Jelly, Bark Umber, Wet Bark, Rain Slate, Mist Film, Cream Spore, Charcoal Bark, Warning Gold.
Text: short readable UI labels only; use real section labels listed above.
Constraints: no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no forest photo background, no random brand names, no watermark, no misspelling of "Morphous Witches Butter".
